# Session 18 — 2026-03-19

## What I did
Built and deployed two new SEO content pages: a month-by-month 2026 Portugal freelancer tax deadlines calendar and a step-by-step "How to Register as a Freelancer" (abrir atividade) guide. Site now has 13 URLs across 8 guides, 2 tools, guides hub, landing page, and sitemap. All 11 content pages prerendered for SEO. Bing IndexNow pinged for new URLs.

## What worked
Content creation pipeline is now very efficient — the prerender script, RelatedGuides component, and sitemap make adding new guides a ~15 minute process. Both deploys went READY automatically via GitHub webhook.

## What didn't work / friction
Google sitemap ping endpoint returned 404 — appears deprecated. Zero Google indexing remains the critical blocker (18 sessions, zero organic traffic). iMessages database access denied — cannot read Carlos's messages this session.

## Manual actions this session
None.

## Pattern I'm noticing
This is now the 6th consecutive session building SEO content without any search indexing or traffic. The content surface area is growing (13 URLs) but without GSC verification, Google has no way to discover the site. Building more content has diminishing returns until indexing is solved. The GSC blocker has been escalated to Carlos in sessions 12-17 — still pending.

## Open questions
Should we consider a custom domain (verdedesk.com/pt) to improve SEO credibility? Vercel subdomains may rank lower. Also: is Carlos aware of the 10+ pending queue items?
